summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Dashboard with new features: Pay Period filtering (bi-weekly), SPIFF commissions separated, Total commission with SPIFF, Avg Commission %, and chronological monthly trend. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/dashboard/kpis returns all new KPI fields: total_commission, spiff_commission, total_commission_with_spiff, avg_commission_percent
Pay Period filter dropdown displays all bi-weekly periods (28 periods found)
Pay period filtering works correctly via API parameter (?pay_period=Jan 08, 2026 - Jan 21, 2026)
KPI calculations correct: Total Revenue $197,316, Commission $17,900.58, SPIFF $4,482.81, Total Commission $22,383.39
Average Commission % displays correctly (8.85% overall, 9.27% filtered)
Frontend displays all 5 new KPI cards: Total Revenue, Commission (5%), SPIFF Commission, Total Commission, Avg Commission %
Pay period filtering updates all KPI values correctly (Revenue drops from $197,316 to $148,940 when filtered)
Monthly Revenue Trend chart shows chronological order
All 4 charts display correctly: Unit Type Distribution, Revenue by Unit Type, Deal Status, Monthly Trend (Chronological)
Pay period filter shows visual indicator when applied with Clear Filter option
Settings dialog shows OneDrive/SharePoint connection instructions
Data integration between backend pay period filtering and frontend display working seamlessly
Commission calculations separate SPIFF from regular commission properly
Total Commission accurately shows Commission + SPIFF
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (All new features working perfectly)
